title: Broadcom Workload Domain
description: A Workload Domain represents a logically isolated group of clusters in VMware Cloud Foundation that provides compute, storage, and networking resources for a specific workload type.

id.description: The unique identifier of the workload domain.

name.description: The name of the workload domain.

type.description: The type of workload domain. MANAGEMENT is the initial domain, VI is a Virtual Infrastructure domain.

status.description: The current status of the workload domain.

primaryDatastoreType.description: The primary datastore type of the cluster.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default cluster in the domain.

fqdn.description: The fully qualified domain name of the host.

clusters.description: The clusters that belong to this workload domain.

ssoId.description: The SSO domain identifier associated with this workload domain.

vcenter.description: The vCenter Server associated with this workload domain.

fqdn.description: The fully qualified domain name of the vCenter.

nsxTCluster.description: The NSX-T cluster associated with this workload domain.

id.description: The identifier of the NSX-T cluster.

vip.description: The virtual IP address of the NSX-T cluster.
